---
name: Appeal
about: Ask whether the gate was applied correctly — never whether to lower it.
title: "[appeal] "
labels: appeal
---

> An appeal is reviewed by a non-author, non-original-evaluator. It asks one question only:
> was the gate applied correctly? It never asks to lower the gate. See GOVERNANCE.md.

- **Proposal / ruling being appealed:** #
- **I am not** the author or the original evaluator: [ ] confirmed

## What was the gate-application error?
<Where specifically was `false_positive_on_warranted == 0` or the coverage floor misapplied?>

## What I am NOT asking
- [ ] I am not asking to lower or waive the gate.
